title: Where Claude Sits
description: A 2x2 quadrant diagram with 'Ease of Setup' on the x-axis and 'Autonomy' on the y-axis. n8n/Zapier sits in the upper-left (high autonomy, hard to set up). ChatGPT sits in the lower-right (easy to set up, low autonomy). Claude Code sits in the upper-right (high autonomy, easy to set up), highlighted as the outlier that doesn't make you choose.

parts.title: Autonomy vs. Ease of Setup
parts.description: A 2x2 quadrant diagram with 'Ease of Setup' on the x-axis and 'Autonomy' on the y-axis. n8n/Zapier sits in the upper-left (high autonomy, hard to set up). ChatGPT sits in the lower-right (easy to set up, low autonomy). Claude Code sits in the upper-right (high autonomy, easy to set up), highlighted as the outlier that doesn't make you choose.
